basic_details.job_title: BEL Sr Asst Engineer Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Offline for 43 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Bharat Electronics Limited (BEL) - A Navaratna Company, Govt. of India Enterprise under Ministry of Defence
basic_details.post_name: Senior Assistant Engineer (Electronics) - E-I Grade on Fixed Tenure
basic_details.short_information: Bharat Electronics Limited (BEL) has published the Senior Assistant Engineer (Ex-Servicemen) Notification 2026 on 28th April 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 43 Senior Assistant Engineer (Electronics) - E-I Grade positions exclusively for Ex-Servicemen. Candidates within the age range of up to 50 years (relaxation available for reserved categories) and holding a 3-Year Diploma in Electronics Engineering with 15 years of post-qualification experience in IAF are eligible to apply offline. The application process will be active from 28th April 2026 to 18th May 2026, and candidates can eas

important_dates.written test date: To be announced on www.bel-india.in (intimated via email)
important_dates.interview_date: To be announced on www.bel-india.in (only for candidates qualifying in Written Test)

age_limit.details: The upper age limit is calculated as on 01.04.2026. The maximum age for General (UR) and EWS candidates is 50 years. OBC (Non-Creamy Layer) candidates get a relaxation of 3 years (upper age limit: 53 years). SC/ST candidates get a relaxation of 5 years (upper age limit: 55 years). | PwBD (Persons with Benchmark Disability) candidates are eligible for age relaxation as per Government of India rules applicable to their respective category. Since this recruitment is exclusively for Ex-Servicemen, age relaxation as per ESM/IAF service norms is inherently covered. Only candidates with at least 40% disability are eligible for PwBD reservation and relaxation.

qualification.education_qualification: 3-Year Diploma in Electronics Engineering or equivalent (Pass Class - no minimum percentage specified)
qualification.details: This recruitment is exclusively for Ex-Servicemen from the Indian Air Force (IAF). Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on 01.04.2026. The minimum educational qualification is a 3-year Diploma in Electronics Engineering or equivalent. Candidates must have served in the IAF in the rank of Junior Warrant Officer (JWO) or above, with a minimum of 15 years of post-qualification experience. | The date of retirement from the IAF must be on or before 01.04.2026. The reservation is 100% for Ex-Servicemen. Candidates currently employed in the Armed Forces who are yet to be discharged must submit documentary proof of their medical category, character, and probable date of discharge.

salary_details.total tenure: 15 years or date of superannuation (age 60), whichever is earlier
salary_details.tenure review: Every 5 years based on individual performance and project requirements
salary_details.place of posting: PAN-India Project Site locations as per company requirement
salary_details.details: Selected candidates will be inducted in the E-I Grade pay scale of Rs. 30,000/- – 3% – 1,20,000/-. In addition to basic pay, the complete remuneration package includes Dearness Allowance (DA), House Rent Allowance (HRA), Perquisites at the rate of 35% of the annual basic pay, reimbursement of medical expenses, Group Insurance, Provident Fund (PF), Gratuity, and Performance Related Pay (PRP) as per Company rules. | The total tenure of engagement will be for a period of 15 years or until the date of superannuation (60 years of age), whichever is earlier. The engagement will be reviewed after every 5 years based on individual performance and project requirements. Posting will be on PAN-India Project Site locations as per company requirements.

selection_process: Stage 1 - Written Test All eligible applicants; shortlisting for interview based on written test performance
Stage 2 - Interview Only candidates qualifying in written test; called in ratio of 1:7 (category-wise vacancy)
Stage 3 - Pre-Employment Medical Examination Selected candidates must be found medically fit as per BEL norms before final appointment
Final Appointment Subject to medical fitness and document verification
Selection for the post of Senior Assistant Engineer

E-I Grade (Fixed Tenure) will be conducted through a Written Test followed by a Personal Interview. Only candidates who qualify in the written test will be called for the interview in a ratio of 1:7 (as per the vacancy in each category).

The candidature at all stages of the selection process is provisional in nature - merely fulfilling the minimum qualification and experience requirements does not guarantee being called for the written test. If the number of eligible applicants is high
the number of candidates to be called for the written test may be restricted based on academic excellence and experience.
BEL reserves the right to change
or number of posts based on actual requirements at the time of selection. All further announcements related to the written test date
and result will be published on www.bel-india.in.
how_to_apply: Candidates must apply in the prescribed application format available on the BEL website www.bel-india.in (Annexure-1). The application form must be submitted on A4 size paper with a recent passport-size colour photograph pasted on it, filled in CAPITAL LETTERS only.

The completed application along with self-attested copies of all required documents must be placed in a sealed envelope with the cover superscribed as "Application for the post of Sr. Asst. Engineer, E-I Grade/RADAR SBU" and sent by Registered Post / Speed Post / Courier to the following address. Hand delivery of applications will not be accepted. Only one application per candidate is allowed - if multiple applications are received, only the latest valid (complete) application will be retained. The last date for receipt of applications is 18.05.2026.
Deputy General Manager (HR & Administration) Bharat Electronics Limited GHAZIABAD
(By Registered Post / Speed Post / Courier only - Hand Delivery NOT accepted)
Envelope Superscription: "Application for the post of Sr. Asst. Engineer, E-I Grade/RADAR SBU"
Last Date for Receipt of Applications: 18.05.2026
important_instructions: Candidates must ensure they meet all eligibility criteria (age, qualification, experience, category, rank, date of retirement from IAF etc.) before applying. Applications must be in the prescribed format (A4 size, CAPITAL LETTERS only) available on www.bel-india.in - incomplete or incorrectly formatted applications will be summarily rejected without assigning reasons. Only one application per candidate is permitted - in case of multiple applications, only the latest valid (complete) application will be retained. Category (General/SC/ST/OBC-NCL) once declared in the application cannot be changed - no requests for category change will be entertained. Candidates must have a valid and active email ID mentioned in the application - written test information will be sent via email; BEL will not be responsible for bouncing or non-receipt of emails due to invalid email IDs. Valid photo identity proof must be produced at the time of appearing for the Written Test. Mere issue of admit card does not imply that candidature has been finally cleared by BEL. If any information provided by the candidate is found incorrect/false/misleading at any stage of selection or after joining, the candidature will be cancelled and employment terminated. Candidates should be in sound health - no relaxation in health standards is allowed; appointment is subject to being found medically fit in the pre-employment medical examination. Work experience indicated without supporting documents will not be considered and may be rejected without prior intimation. If any applicant has litigated with a previous employer in the past, the same must be clearly mentioned in brief in the application. Any form of canvassing or influence will result in disqualification. BEL reserves the right to debar/disqualify any candidate at any stage of the selection process. All further announcements related to this recruitment will be published on www.bel-india.in only. All disputes are subject to the sole jurisdiction of Courts in Uttar Pradesh.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to submit applications for BEL Sr. Asst. Engineer (ESM) Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for receipt of applications for BEL Senior Assistant Engineer (Ex-Servicemen) Recruitment 2026 is 18 May 2026. Applications must be sent by Registered Post, Speed Post, or Courier to the Deputy General Manager (HR & Administration), Bharat Electronics Limited, Ghaziabad - hand delivery is not accepted. The advertisement was released on 28 April 2026 with Advertisement No. 13704/02/HR-RADAR/GAD/2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are announced for BEL Senior Assistant Engineer (ESM) posts?
faq.answer: A total of 43 vacancies have been announced for the post of Senior Assistant Engineer (Electronics), E-I Grade on Fixed Tenure exclusively for Ex-Servicemen. The category-wise distribution is: Unreserved (UR) - 22 posts, OBC (Non-Creamy Layer) - 11 posts, Scheduled Caste (SC) - 7 posts, and Scheduled Tribe (ST) - 3 posts. All posts carry 100% reservation for Ex-Servicemen from the Indian Air Force (IAF).

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for BEL Sr. Asst. Engineer (ESM) posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a 3-Year Diploma in Electronics Engineering or equivalent with Pass Class (no minimum percentage specified). Additionally, candidates must have served in the Indian Air Force in the rank of Junior Warrant Officer (JWO) or above, with a minimum of 15 years of post-qualification experience. The date of retirement from the IAF must be on or before 01 April 2026.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for BEL Senior Assistant Engineer (Ex-Servicemen) Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The upper age limit is calculated as on 01 April 2026, with the maximum age for General (UR) and EWS candidates being 50 years. OBC (Non-Creamy Layer) candidates receive a 3-year relaxation (maximum 53 years), while SC/ST candidates get 5 years relaxation (maximum 55 years). PwBD (Persons with Benchmark Disability) candidates are eligible for age relaxation as per Government of India rules applicable to their respective category.

faq.question: Q5. Is this recruitment exclusively for Ex-Servicemen from specific forces?
faq.answer: Yes, this recruitment is exclusively (100% reservation) for Ex-Servicemen from the Indian Air Force (IAF) only. Candidates must have served in the IAF in the rank of Junior Commissioned Officer - Junior Warrant Officer (JWO) or above. The date of retirement from the IAF must be on or before 01 April 2026, and the discharge book/certificate must clearly indicate medical category and Exemplary/Very Good (or equivalent) character on discharge.

faq.question: Q6. What is the pay scale and benefits for BEL Sr. Asst. Engineer (ESM) posts?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will be inducted in E-I Grade with a pay scale of Rs. 30,000/- – 3% – 1,20,000/-. The complete remuneration package includes Dearness Allowance (DA), House Rent Allowance (HRA), Perquisites at 35% of annual basic pay, reimbursement of medical expenses, Group Insurance, Provident Fund (PF), Gratuity, and Performance Related Pay (PRP) as per Company rules. The total tenure of engagement will be for 15 years or until the date of superannuation (60 years of age), whichever is earlier, with a review every 5 years based on individual performance and project requirements.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for BEL Sr. Asst. Engineer (ESM) Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Selection will be conducted through a Written Test followed by a Personal Interview. Only candidates who qualify in the written test will be called for the interview in a ratio of 1:7 as per the vacancy in each category. Finally, selected candidates must undergo a Pre-Employment Medical Examination and be found medically fit as per BEL norms before final appointment. All candidature at all stages is provisional, and merely fulfilling minimum qualification and experience requirements does not guarantee being called for the written test.

faq.question: Q8. Can I apply online for this BEL recruitment?
faq.answer: No, this is an offline recruitment drive. Applications must be submitted in the prescribed format (available on www.bel-india.in as Annexure-1) on A4 size paper, filled in CAPITAL LETTERS only, with a recent passport-size colour photograph pasted on the application form. The completed application along with self-attested copies of all required documents must be sent in a sealed envelope by Registered Post/Speed Post/Courier to the Deputy General Manager (HR & Administration), BEL Ghaziabad - hand delivery is not accepted.

faq.question: What is the last date to submit applications for BEL Sr. Asst. Engineer (ESM) Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for receipt of applications for BEL Senior Assistant Engineer (Ex-Servicemen) Recruitment 2026 is 18 May 2026. Applications must be sent by Registered Post, Speed Post, or Courier to the Deputy General Manager (HR & Administration), Bharat Electronics Limited, Ghaziabad - hand delivery is not accepted.
